title: AGS Betesda hosts successful golf day
description: CRADOCK NEWS - The AGS Betesda church...
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NEWS - The AGS Betesda church brought together a community of golf enthusiasts for their annual golf tournament at Cradock Golf Club on Saturday 27 January.","html":"CRADOCK NEWS - The AGS Betesda church brought together a community of golf enthusiasts for their annual golf tournament at Cradock Golf Club on Saturday 27 January."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Amidst the scorching heat and a refreshing shower of rain, participants were met with a challenging yet rewarding golfing experience.","html":"Amidst the scorching heat and a refreshing shower of rain, participants were met with a challenging yet rewarding golfing experience."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The atmosphere was filled with excitement and camaraderie as players and non-players alike enjoyed a day of thrilling golf."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The standout duo of PW Michau and Johan de Jager emerged as the day's champions, each securing two nights' self-catering accommodation at Sanctuary's luxurious tented lodging.","html":"The standout duo of PW Michau and Johan de Jager emerged as the day's champions, each securing two nights' self-catering accommodation at Sanctuary's luxurious tented lodging."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wim Botha (Cradock Golf Club President) and Stoney Steenkamp claimed the second prize, winning a warthog each, generously sponsored by Louis Du Preez.","html":"Wim Botha (Cradock Golf Club President) and Stoney Steenkamp claimed the second prize, winning a warthog each, generously sponsored by Louis Du Preez."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The Pro Shop contributed to the excitement with sponsored prizes for various achievements, including nearest-to-the-pin awards for Jacques van Nieuwenhuizen, Bull Jordaan, WB Brink, and John Walker.","html":"The Pro Shop contributed to the excitement with sponsored prizes for various achievements, including nearest-to-the-pin awards for Jacques van Nieuwenhuizen, Bull Jordaan, WB Brink, and John Walker."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"• Nearest to the pin #3/12 – Jacques van Nieuwenhuizen and Bull Jordaan• Nearest to the pin #9/18 – WB Brink and John Walker• Straightest drive #17 WB Brink","html":"• Nearest to the pin #3/12 – Jacques van Nieuwenhuizen and Bull Jordaan
• Nearest to the pin #9/18 – WB Brink and John Walker
• Straightest drive #17 WB Brink"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The 'water prize', sponsored by LockeRoom, went to Niel de Jager for donating the most golf balls to the water canal."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The putting competition, sponsored by Karoo Brokers, saw Jacques van Nieuwenhuizen emerge victorious after an impressive 36-hole day. Dirkie Hoffman clinched the general putting competition, while Ellinke van der Mescht secured the runner-up position.","html":"The putting competition, sponsored by Karoo Brokers, saw Jacques van Nieuwenhuizen emerge victorious after an impressive 36-hole day. Dirkie Hoffman clinched the general putting competition, while Ellinke van der Mescht secured the runner-up position."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Jaco Marais walked away as the lucky winner of Jeep sunglasses, sponsored by Bergman/Adam."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The AGS Betesda Church extends its gratitude to the numerous sponsors who made the event possible. Steven Mullineux, FC Cloete, Louis du Preez, and many others played a crucial role in contributing to the success of this year's golf tournament.","html":"The AGS Betesda Church extends its gratitude to the numerous sponsors who made the event possible. Steven Mullineux, FC Cloete, Louis du Preez, and many others played a crucial role in contributing to the success of this year's golf tournament."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The AGS Betesda Church looks forward to more exciting events in the future, bringing the community together through the love of golf.","html":"The AGS Betesda Church looks forward to more exciting events in the future, bringing the community together through the love of golf."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: AGS Betesda hosts successful golf day
